description: Create an OpenLCA Project to compare freight transport modes using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and LCIA methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). The project should compare two product systems—one for a 'Combination truck' and one for 'Rail' or 'Train'—as variants. Run the comparison using the TRACI 2.1 method and export the results to ~/LCA_Results/transport_project_comparison.csv.
